title: 24 Piece Dinner Sets for 6 People - Beautiful Mediterranean Style Stoneware Dinner Set for 6 - Dishwasher & Microwave Safe Plates and Bowls Set for 6 - Dinnerware Sets by Pure Living in Dark Petrol
features: ✅ Bring Ibiza Flair to your home: an incomparable feeling, a unique tableware set for 6 people. Harmonious petrol and cool matte black invite you to dream - a dinner service that radiates casual island vibes

✅ Pure joy that lasts: the bowl and plate set is made of solid stoneware with high-quality fired, glazed and scratch-resistant inner surface - a dining service set for those who love the beautiful things in life and rely on quality

✅ A set for all occasions: the 24-piece tableware set fully exploits its ultimate favourite crockery potential. 6 x dinner plates, 6 x breakfast plates, 6 x deep plates, 6 x bowls - perfect for everyday use as well as for special occasions

✅ Make yourself easy and comfortable: At Pure Living, great style meets 100% suitability for everyday use. Pack the easy-care plates and bowls carefree in the microwave, they like this! Now it comes: the tableware is also dishwasher safe

✅ Mix and match your dream tableware: the Ibiza line provides you with everything you need: individual sets of stoneware dinner service (large and small plates, soup plates, bowls and cups) and multi-piece set. Crockery service - all in different colours

specifications_table.Is mould resistant: ‎No plastic, no melamine, no bisphenol A (BPA), no lead, no cadmium
